calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem James H. Fleming, Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:55am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. 6 related cases are heard together: *028190, 028192, 028195, 028197, 028200, 028201. Detailed minutes, and exhibits, will be entered under Case No. 028190. Exhibits will be retained in that file until returned to parties.

Anna Levitan, official Russian Interpreter, appears with Mr. Lipson, to serve as translator for the appellants in all 6 related cases; Mr. Alec Berger serves as an informal Russian interpreter for the Respondents in all 6 related cases. Mr. Berger's wife, Nelly Merzhevitsky is also present in court.

*028190: Respondent, Lyuya Borukhovich appears in Pro; Appellant Meest-Ca International, Inc. appears through counsel Kenneth A. Lipson.

Respondents, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative with the help of Mr. Berger. Mr. Lipson presents Appellant's case, with the help of Ms. Levitan.
EXH1(R) receipts for shipments
EXH2(R) Pages of figures and statement received by Mr. Berger by FAX
EXHA(A) Sample form used by Slavic Post
EXH3(R) 9/21/04 letter
EXHB(A) Log of packages
EXH4(R) 2 receipts showing delivery of packages
ID/EV evidence
11:20am
Cross-examination by Mr. Lipson of Mr. Berger
11:45am
Court takes a 5 minute recess
12:00pm
Court resumes, Mr. Berger is late returning to court. Judge Fleming questions Ms. Nelly Merzhervitsky (wife of Mr. Berger).
Cross-examination by Mr. Lipson of Ms. Merzheevitsky
12:20pm
Judge Fleming questions Mr. Berger

Mr. Berger and Ms. Merzhevitsky have a business relationship with all the respondents, and
Mr. Lipson argues that the case should not go forward if Mr. Berger acts as an intepreter.
Judge Fleming states that with the help of Ms. Levitan and some of the respondents who speak good English, the case can proceed.
1:00pm
All matters are submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Continued To Dec-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
